Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order: (1) Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; And (2) Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ranjeet Brar, of Quall Cardot LLP, Tel. 559.418.0333, for plaintiffs;
Julio Escobedo, in pro per, Tel. 415.678.0232, for defendants;
Spanish Interpreter: Maritza Ayerdi

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC Motion For Order: (1) Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted, as defendant provided substantially compliant responses prior to the hearing. Request for Sanctions is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
